title: Reduce Input Immediately
description: Lower stimulation before doing anything else.
steps: Put your phone face down or in another room.
Turn off one light or lower brightness.
Sit still for 2 minutes without adding new input.

title: Clear One Small Surface
description: Reduce visual noise in one tiny area.
steps: Choose one small space (desk corner, nightstand, sink).
Stop when finished — no expanding the task.

title: Three-Item Reset
description: Limit your brain to no more than three priorities
steps: Write down everything swirling in your head.
Choose one and set a 10-minute timer.
